UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile on the Waste2Product platform, storing personal information, green credit balance, and overall eco-contributions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The user's email address, used for contact and identification.

walletBalance.description: Current balance of Green Credits the user possesses.

totalWasteSubmittedKg.description: Total weight in kilograms of waste submitted by the user.

carbonSavedKg.description: Estimated total kilograms of carbon emissions saved due to the user's recycling efforts.

ecoScore.description: An AI-calculated score reflecting the user's overall environmental contribution and recycling efficiency.

leaderboardRank.description: The user's current rank on the platform's leaderboard.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

Pickup.title: Pickup
Pickup.description: Manages the scheduling and tracking of waste pickups requested by users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Pickup entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who requested the pickup.

date.description: The date scheduled for the waste pickup.

timeSlot.description: The specific time slot scheduled for the pickup.

address.description: The full address for the waste pickup.

lat.description: Geographical latitude of the pickup location.

lng.description: Geographical longitude of the pickup location.

status.description: Current status of the pickup (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Transit', 'Completed').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the pickup record was created.

definition.description: Global collection for all scheduled pickups.
